main.radialoffhand.title: Radial Offhand
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.radialoff: A faster way to put items into offhand
Controls how big the radial menu appears on screen.
config.radialoffhand.option.toggleMode.t: The radial menu stays open after pressing the key and closes when pressed again. Left mouse button (LMB) is used for selection.
config.radialoffhand.option.shownames.to: Shows item name in radial menu slots.
config.radialoffhand.option.hideEmptySlo: If true, empty slots on menu will not appear in the radial menu.
config.radialoffhand.option.useCenterIte: Show a Item Preview In The Center
Enables the item preview shown in the center of the radial menu.
config.radialoffhand.option.useCenterPre: Show Item Description In The Center
Shows the selected item's description in the center of the radial menu.
config.radialoffhand.option.allowMovemen: Allows the player to move while the radial menu is open.
config.radialoffhand.option.usePriorityS: Sorts items by category: Totem, Defense, Mobility(Fireworks), Torches, Food, Blocks.
